name: Eden of Propagation
descriptionTemplate:
When Saya is in the team, the {Caro} Realm mutates into {Propagation: Caro}.
{Embryo Fusion}: The {Embryo Fusion} gained per turn increases to 50~100, scaling with HP lost. The {Embryo Fusion} cap increases from 100 to 200. Upon reaching the cap, add 1 {Propagule Embryo} into hand.
{Propagule Embryo}: Playing this card no longer grants Crit. Rate. {Devour} no longer grants Shield or Temporary {STR}. The first time each Awakener consumes a {Propagule Embryo} each turn, they gain 40 stacks of {Propagation Fiesta}: Each stack enhances the following Final effects of that Awakener's next Exalt this turn by 1%: Final DMG, Fixed Shield, Fixed HP Recovery, Fixed {STR}/{STR⯆}, {Tentacle DMG} Bonus, Fixed {Poison}, and Fixed {Counter}.
{Crimson Furnace}: The auto-accumulation at the start of each turn changes to 10% of HP lost, up to 50% of Max HP. No longer accumulates at the end of battle. 3 turns cooldown.
Crimson Corrosion: After using {Crimson Furnace}, inflict {Corrosion} on all enemies equal to 1% of their Max HP. The more {Crimson Furnace} consumed, the stronger the {Corrosion} effect, up to +100%. Deals 5× {Corrosion} effect against "Empty Shell" enemies.
At the start of exploration, Max HP +10%, team DMG Amplification +50%, and all Awakeners gain 20 stacks of {Propagation Fiesta} at the start of each turn. If the team consists only of {Caro} or {Chaos} Awakeners, the DMG Amplification granted by this effect is doubled.
Realm Mastery becomes {Propagation: Caro Mastery}: Each point of Realm Mastery increases the {Propagation Fiesta} stacks gained from {Propagation: Caro} by 0.05%.
If the team consists only of {Caro} or {Chaos} Awakeners, the {Propagation: Caro Mastery} effect is doubled.
